name: search returns results
_comment: Each step is ONE object with one supported action key plus that action's options; option order does not matter. Use --gen-test tests/test_search.py for Python or --gen-test tests/search.spec.ts for @playwright/test. See negative-flow.example.json for network failure and state accessibility steps.
_supportedActions: mockResponse mockAbort goto click fill type select check uncheck press hover scrollTo waitFor waitForUrl wait expectText expectUrl expectVisible expectNotVisible expectValue expectCount auditA11y screenshot
